title: MPC92
description: Adds a modified MPL85 for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
Addon for the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod:
You must use this mod for the contents of this pack to function, it should
appear on the train sidings once the pack is loaded.

The MPC92 is a variant of the MPL85, included in the base MTR mod. It includes seats based on Japanese commuter trains, both longitudinal and transverse.
It is available in three lengths, 9m, 14m and 20m that fit with the MTR Urban line door spacing.
Half of the cars feature transverse seats and the other features semi-longitudinal seats.

Fictionally introduced in 1992, it was intended to operate on the Coinville project, and was the first **public** train with 3-door 14m cars for the mod.

original MPL85 model by Jonathan Ho included in the base mod.

### **Terms of use**
_Unmodified refers to any non-explicit modification of the files, meaning you have only combined the assets from 2 versions of the same pack without even touching the .json (as an example)._

-Please do not put a paywall under any unmodified copy of the pack that you redistribute.
-If you redistribute an unmodified copy of any of my assets outside of Modrinth, a credit would be appreciated.
-The Modrinth TOS request any reupload on that site to credit the original author.

UPDATE:

-Any redistribution(even of modified assets) on any other site **should not refrain me from distributing the original version of the pack by myself**, this includes setting the license to ARR on Modrinth(see below).
-When redistributing on Modrinth any asset I have created, even if I published these outside of this site, please do not set the license to ARR as you are refraining other people from posting their own variants.

This is a prerelease I first released on May 30 2023 in Discord, except visual issues!
